title: Alexa's Classic Villagers
description: Replaces modern villagers with their pre-1.14 equivalents
body:
# Alexa's Classic Villagers!
Alexa's Classic villagers is a simple 1.21 texture pack that reskins modern villagers and zombie villagers to look like their pre-1.14 counterparts. The functionality is the same, you just need to talk to them to see their profession and level.

## Farmer
Replaces the farmer, fisherman, fletcher, and shepherd.
![Farmer Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/625a973abc9f4dd32fdebaa63594026a42001275.png)![Farmer Zombie Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47c35389c2fe48c2ec5cc91a81fb112f38dbc55f.png)

## Librarian
Replaces the librarian and cartographer.
![Library Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a1f8c9a8851df70b81dee8daa08bf9606642d8c.png)
![Library Zombie Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a5f9febf7782c45fc748dfaf4f8c92fad80cde7.png)

## Priest
Replaces the cleric.
![Priest Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/962923103cdb2c75e8fc9b6f743ffb2a88cc7620.png)
![Priest Zombie Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71d1fb0e887c43fa19d3812499406829335564e1.png)

## Butcher
Replaces the butcher and leatherworker.
![Butcher Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c12b44ec8b7233f74d9c0bf77cf7ba42a50ae446.png)
![Butcher Zombie Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be69fd4084097883906e3374c4d3446bc01f7c8c.png)

## Smith
Replaces the weaponsmith, toolsmith, armorer, and mason.
![Smith Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f16f5337bceb4b045735234478ca9169c7f14f1c_0.webp)
![Smith Zombie Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/772d462c99c09ffb61fe5a1d9ffa9a97ac4428e5.png)

## Nitwit
Still himself.
![Nitwit Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1c9156be0c022d0bfefaad12f674a9f6e74671e.png)
![Nitwit Zombie Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c8ae5a57d8c9d4cb2fdbc0b2355569ed7d595d5.png)

## Naked Villager! (not really)
Replaces villagers that don't have jobs. Only exists because I removed all the biome outfits. Basically the villager texture without the over clothes. And the zombie verson uses the OG zombie villager texture!
![Nekkid Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bb75c387bfa490a2783f63ef15a2c7ec236f041.png)
![Nekkid Zombie Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f21f762341e45ea9a593101daa72490f3da8550.png)

## Wandering Trader
Now looks like the unreleased blue villager seen in the horse update promotional artwork.
![Wandering Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1c75028c3806ee2beafa7ab1e4c1a57ee05e9fe.png)

These screenshots were taken while using both this texture pack and the built-in Programmer Art texture pack.
